+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "missionClass": "fixer",

+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: \"Segmentation fault\" on alpine linux",
+    "description": "\"Segmentation fault\" on alpine linux. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your grpc setup:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nCheck your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\n### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?\n`grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux` on ruby 3.0.2\n\n### What operating system (Linux, Windows,...) and version?\nAlpine Linux 3.14 (ruby `3.0.2-alpine3.14` docker image)\n\n### What runtime / compiler are"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for \"Segmentation fault\" on alpine linux",
+        "description": "Looking at objdump, this looks to be similar to grpc/grpc-java#8751. It appears __strdup isn't available and the linker doesn't produce a clean error.\n\n```\n000000000005e6e0 <__strdup>:\n   5e6e0:\tff 25 8a cc 59 00    \tjmp    *0x59cc8a(%rip)        # 5fb370 <__strdup.2.5>\n   5e6e6:\t68 6b 00 00 00    \n```yaml\n/usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/active_call.rb:367: [BUG] Segmentation fault at 0x000000000005e6e6\n ruby 3.0.2p107 (2021-07-07 revision 0db68f0233) [x86_64-linux-musl]\n \n -- Control frame information -----------------------------------------------\n c:0034 p:---- s:0211 e:000210 CFUNC  :run_batch\n c:0033 p:0088 s:0206 e:000205 METHOD /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/active_call.rb:367\n c:0032 p:0012 s:0197 e:000196 BLOCK  /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/client_stub.rb:174\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm \"Segmentation fault\" on alpine linux is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Looking at objdump, this looks to be similar to grpc/grpc-java#8751. It appears __strdup isn't available and the linker doesn't produce a clean error.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "/usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/active_call.rb:367: [BUG] Segmentation fault at 0x000000000005e6e6\n ruby 3.0.2p107 (2021-07-07 revision 0db68f0233) [x86_64-linux-musl]\n \n -- Control frame information -----------------------------------------------\n c:0034 p:---- s:0211 e:000210 CFUNC  :run_batch\n c:0033 p:0088 s:0206 e:000205 METHOD /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/active_call.rb:367\n c:0032 p:0012 s:0197 e:000196 BLOCK  /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/client_stub.rb:174\n c:0031 p:0013 s:0194 e:000193 METHOD /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/interceptors.rb:170\n c:0030 p:0010 s:0187 e:000186 BLOCK  /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1",
+        "/usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.43.1-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/active_call.rb:367: [BUG] Segmentation fault at 0x00000000000636e6\nruby 2.7.5p203 (2021-11-24 revision f69aeb8314) [x86_64-linux-musl]\n-- Control frame information -----------------------------------------------\nc:0012 p:---- s:0082 e:000081 CFUNC :run_batch\nc:0011 p:0088 s:0077 e:000076 METHOD /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.43.1-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/active_call.rb:367\nc:0010 p:0009 s:0068 e:000067 BLOCK /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.43.1-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/client_stub.rb:180\nc:0009 p:0013 s:0065 e:000064 METHOD /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.43.1-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/interceptors.rb:170\nc:0008 p:0093 s:0058 e:000057 METHOD /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.43.1-x86_6"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
